briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby Housing Authority's First Audited Financial Statements
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review the first-ever audited financial statements for the Burnaby Housing Authority Corporation (BHA), covering its launch in June 2024 through December 31, 2025. The report shows the City transferred $37.5 million to BHA to fund affordable and market rental housing projects.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — BHA's housing projects may affect local development and rental supply in Burnaby.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Finance & Insurance
